exercises.name: barbell Squat
instructions: Set up for the barbell Squat using barbell.
Maintain proper posture throughout the movement.
Move through a controlled range of motion.
Pause briefly at the hardest portion of the lift.
Return to the starting position under control.
exercises.description: barbell Squat is a widely used barbell-based exercise that primarily targets the quadriceps. It is commonly included in strength and hypertrophy programs.

Maintain proper posture throughout the movement.
Move through a controlled range of motion.
Pause briefly at the hardest portion of the lift.
Return to the starting position under control.
exercises.description: Eccentric dumbbell Front Squat is a widely used dumbbell-based exercise that primarily targets the quadriceps. It is commonly included in strength and hypertrophy programs.

Maintain proper posture throughout the movement.
Move through a controlled range of motion.
Pause briefly at the hardest portion of the lift.
Return to the starting position under control.
exercises.description: body weight Cable Kickback is a widely used body weight-based exercise that primarily targets the glutes. It is commonly included in strength and hypertrophy programs.
